title: pyxidaria viscosa
side_effects: Pyxidaria viscosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, as well as allergic reactions like skin irritation and rashes. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to kidney damage and increased heart rate. Improper use of pyxidaria viscosa may also cause dizziness, headaches, and altered blood pressure levels. Furthermore, pregnant women and individuals with pre-existing medical conditions should exercise extreme caution when handling or consuming the plant, as it may exacerbate their conditions.
